key_findings: NDJSON v2 (no outer array, title:null, realistic UUID, h2_mode=2) still causes SILENT RESET
message.newChat mutation fails - tRPC client rejects the response
Unlike #322 which showed Error 6002, v2 template silently resets like #323
Removing outer array brackets [] may have caused different parsing behavior
h2_mode=2 keep-alive alone is not sufficient - the NDJSON content format matters
The Error 6002 in #322 was actually a BETTER result - at least user saw something

comparison.324_ndjson_v2_no_array: SILENT_RESET - v2 format rejected by tRPC client

recommendation: The original NDJSON format from #322 (with outer array brackets) produced the best result (Error 6002 visible to user). V2 without array is worse. Next steps: (1) Revert to v1 array format and try to modify the NDJSON content to produce a chat message instead of Error 6002, (2) Investigate if the superjson serialization format needs specific meta.values structure, (3) Consider if the ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR in #322 was from a follow-up request (event.sendEventToDataLake) rather than the main message.newChat response.
